title: Design Partner Program - Build AI Agent Governance | APort
full_text:
Design Partner Program • 5-10 Spots Available
Build the Future of AI Agent Governance
Join our design partner program to co-develop the authorization layer for AI agents. 60-90 day pilot. White-glove onboarding. 50% Year 1 discount for early partners.
Free 60-90 day pilot

How It Works
From application to production in 5 simple steps
Apply
Fill out 5-minute application form below
Qualify
We'll review and schedule intro call (within 48 hours)
Kickoff
Setup call + credentials provisioned (Week 1)
Pilot
60-90 day trial with weekly check-ins
Convert
If successful, transition to paid contract with 50% Year 1 discount
Frequently Asked Questions
What's the time commitment?
30-minute weekly calls during the 60-90 day pilot. Plus integration time (typically 1-2 days for initial setup).
Do I need production traffic?
Yes. We're looking for partners with real production use cases (minimum 100 policy decisions/day). This helps us build a product that works in the real world.
What happens after the pilot?
If the pilot is successful, you transition to a paid contract with 50% Year 1 discount (grandfathered forever). If not, no hard feelings—we part ways.
How is this different from a free trial?
Design partners get white-glove support, custom policy development, and influence over the product roadmap. Free trials (coming later) will be self-service with limited features.
Ready to Get Started?
Limited spots available. Apply now to join the Design Partner Program.
Apply Now Ask Questions
